title: Wellness CORE Training Treats Chicken & Berries, Soft Grain Free Dog Snacks, Perfect Rewards for Training, 170g
features: 100% GRAIN-FREE: Wellness CORE Protein Treats with chicken & berries are grain free, gentle on digestion, and support dogs with sensitive tummies
PERFECT SIZE FOR TRAINING: Fun flower-shaped dog treats that can be broken into smaller pieces, making them ideal for training & daily rewarding
FRESH MEAT AS MAIN INGREDIENT: Soft chicken dog treats crafted with real meat as the #1 ingredient, perfect for rewarding after training sessions
RICH IN ANTIOXIDANTS: Made with berries, these dog treats are naturally rich in antioxidants to support immune system health & overall wellbeing
NATURALLY HYPOALLERGENIC: Free from cereals, gluten, soy, dairy, eggs, artificial colors, flavors & preservatives, ideal for sensitive dogs
